text: You are not your symptom; you are the one who notices it.
reflectionPrompt: Where in your day can you practice noticing without judging?

text: Wholeness is not the absence of pain but the honesty that holds it.
reflectionPrompt: What small truth needs your voice today?

text: The truest self is quiet; meet it where you can hear.
reflectionPrompt: When did you last feel inward quiet?

text: Your body is a messenger; listen before it shouts.
reflectionPrompt: What message might your body be carrying now?

text: Identity grows where attention is kind.
reflectionPrompt: How can you direct kinder attention to yourself?

text: You belong in your own life.
reflectionPrompt: Which daily choice reclaims your belonging?
